title: John Stanback
text: Home * People * John Stanback John Stanback [1] John Stanback , an American electrical engineer and computer chess programmer. He started chess programming in about 1978 with Basic and Fortran , until he switched to Pascal and in 1986 to C . His early program SCP (Stanback Chess Program), was already published in 1987 as open source in comp.sources.games [2] , and later evolved to GNU Chess . In 1989 John Stanback did a complete rewrite and called the new program Zarkov [3] , which was subject of experiments with various ideas until recently. In June 2016, the successor of Zarkov dubbed Wasp was released, announced and hosted by Frank Quisinsky [4] [5] .
